mapper.select: /*AcenCnsltCanMapper.getAcenCnsltMstList*/ SELECT A.CNSLT_SEQ FROM NMCP_ACEN_CNSLT_MST@DL_MCP A WHERE TRUNC(A.RVISN_DTTM) BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrDay}-7 AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrDay}-1 AND A.PROC_YN = 'Y' AND A.CNSLT_SEQ NOT IN (SELECT CNSLT_SEQ FROM NMCP_ACEN_CNSLT_MST@DL_CAN WHERE CNSLT_SEQ = A.CNSLT_SEQ)

/*AcenCnsltCanMapper.getAcenCnsltMst*/ SELECT CNSLT_SEQ, TALK_YM, TO_CHAR(TALK_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TALK_DT, CUSTOMER_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, CNSLT_ID, CNSLT_MID, TALK_TEL_NO, TALK_TYPE, TO_CHAR(TALK_STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TALK_STRT_DTTM, TO_CHAR(TALK_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TALK_END_DTTM, TALK_TOTAL_TIME, ACW_TOTAL_TIME, TALK_RESULT_CODE, CNSLT_TYPE_FIR_NM, CNSLT_TYPE_SEC_NM, CNSLT_TYPE_THI_NM, CNSLT_TYPE_DTL_NM, FN_GET_ACEN_CNSLT_CONTENT@DL_MCP(#{cnsltSeq}, 1, 1000) AS CNSLT_CONTENT, TALK_NM, PROC_YN, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGST_DTTM, TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RVISN_DTTM FROM NMCP_ACEN_CNSLT_MST@DL_MCP WHERE CNSLT_SEQ = #{cnsltSeq}
mapper.insert: /*AcenCnsltCanMapper.insertAcenCnsltMstCan*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_ACEN_CNSLT_MST@DL_CAN ( CNSLT_SEQ, TALK_YM, TALK_DT, CUSTOMER_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, CNSLT_ID, CNSLT_MID, TALK_TEL_NO, TALK_TYPE, TALK_STRT_DTTM, TALK_END_DTTM, TALK_TOTAL_TIME, ACW_TOTAL_TIME, TALK_RESULT_CODE, CNSLT_TYPE_FIR_NM, CNSLT_TYPE_SEC_NM, CNSLT_TYPE_THI_NM, CNSLT_TYPE_DTL_NM, CNSLT_CONTENT, TALK_NM, PROC_YN, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_DTTM, TRANSFER_DTTM )VALUES( #{cnsltSeq}, #{talkYm}, TO_DATE(#{talkDt},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{customerNo}, #{contractNum}, #{cnsltId}, #{cnsltMid}, #{talkTelNo}, #{talkType}, TO_DATE(#{talkStrtDttm},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TO_DATE(#{talkEndDttm},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{talkTotalTime}, #{acwTotalTime}, #{talkResultCode}, #{cnsltTypeFirNm}, #{cnsltTypeSecNm}, #{cnsltTypeThiNm}, #{cnsltTypeDtlNm}, #{cnsltContent}, #{talkNm}, #{procYn}, TO_DATE(#{regstDttm},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TO_DATE(#{rvisnDttm},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), SYSDATE )

/*AcenCnsltCanMapper.insertAcenCnsltDtl*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_ACEN_CNSLT_DTL@DL_CAN ( CNSLT_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, DATA_TYPE, AGE, BIRTH_DT, GENDER, OPEN_AGNT_CD, SUB_STATUS, LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, CANCEL_DATE, STOP_DATE, OPER_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, FST_USIM_ORG_ID, USIM_ORG_ID, RATE_CD, MRKT_AGREE_YN, USIM_TYPE, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_DTTM, TRANSFER_DTTM ) SELECT CNSLT_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, DATA_TYPE, AGE, BIRTH_DT, GENDER, OPEN_AGNT_CD, SUB_STATUS, LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, CANCEL_DATE, STOP_DATE, OPER_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, FST_USIM_ORG_ID, USIM_ORG_ID, RATE_CD, MRKT_AGREE_YN, USIM_TYPE, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_DTTM, SYSDATE FROM NMCP_ACEN_CNSLT_DTL@DL_MCP A WHERE CNSLT_SEQ = #{cnsltSeq} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_ACEN_CNSLT_DTL@DL_CAN WHERE CNSLT_SEQ = A.CNSLT_SEQ)
